_note: DECISIVE TEST - downgrade a NATURAL HIT into a no-damage MISS (closes the missing mandate half: hit -> miss + zero damage). Two real-code hooks act on the SAME target (Ramza, charId 0x01), each MaxWrites=1, single-shot: (1) PreClampDamageRewrite at 0x30A66F forces the staged HP debit to 0 (ForcedDebit=0) so Ramza loses NO HP; (2) the ResultSelector control at 0x205210 matches a NATURAL HIT (MatchEvadeType=0 => +1C0==0x00) and rewrites it to a class-evade render (ForceEvadeType=4, ForceResultCode=0 => +1BE=0). Method: Agrias attacks Ramza front-on. If Ramza naturally BLOCKS/evades, nothing fires (control only matches a hit) - just attack again until a clean HIT lands. On that first hit: expect Ramza to play the class-evade 'Miss' sidestep AND take 0 damage; log shows [CONTROL WROTE evadeType=0x04(class-evade)] and the pre-clamp forced-debit line. This is the inverse of the proven evade->evade swap and proves we can impose an evade render + zero damage on a record the engine rolled as a HIT. Safe: one write each, one target, no KO path. REQUIRES a fresh game launch (asm bakes the immediates at mod load).
